untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of explicit support/resistance level breaks and reversals within a specific timeframe (1-2 days), plus pattern identification (head-and-shoulders, trendline breaks). No indicators in the allowed set can reliably detect dynamic support/resistance breaks, pattern formation/failure, or multi-bar reversal sequences. Pivot points (s1/r1) used as proxy but cannot capture true pattern failure logic.
translation_notes: Signal requires pattern-specific logic (support breaks with reversal, H&S neckline breaks) that cannot be fully expressed with price action and technical indicators alone. Attempted proxy using pivot support (s1) and resistance (r1) levels with reversal logic, but this does not capture the nuanced pattern failure confirmation described in the original rule. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection functions.
